name: Cheese Quesadilla
instructions:
1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. Butter one side of each tortilla.

2. Place 2 tortillas butter-side-down in the skillet. Sprinkle evenly with cheddar and mozzarella cheese.

3. Top with the remaining 2 tortillas, butter-side-up.

4. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the bottom is golden and cheese starts to melt.

5. Carefully flip each quesadilla with a spatula. Cook for another 2 minutes until the second side is golden and cheese is fully melted.

6. Remove from skillet and let rest for 1 minute. Slice each into 4 wedges.

7. Serve with sour cream on the side.
simpleInstructions:
1. Heat skillet over medium heat. Butter one side of each tortilla.

2. Place 2 tortillas butter-side-down. Top with cheese.

3. Cover with remaining tortillas, butter-side-up.

4. Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cheese melts.

5. Rest 1 minute, slice into wedges.

6. Serve with sour cream.
